knowledge_source_scope.name: knowledge_source_scope
knowledge_source_scope.value: "brand_knowledge_sources"."brand_id" IS NOT NULL OR "brand_knowledge_sources"."study_corpus_id" IS NOT NULL

corpus_has_exactly_one_subject.name: corpus_has_exactly_one_subject
corpus_has_exactly_one_subject.value: (("study_corpora"."brand_id" IS NOT NULL)::int + ("study_corpora"."theme_id" IS NOT NULL)::int) = 1
